frame_label: Women's Safety as Her Own Responsibility
generated_comment: Dekho, I agree ki sabko freedom honi chahiye, but practicality bhi dekho na. Agar raat ko 12-1 baje akeli nikalogi, woh bhi kuch areas mein, toh risk toh badh hi jaata hai. We can't change everyone overnight. Ladkiyon ko apna khayal khud rakhna hi padega, especially in today's time. Bas careful raho, that's all I'm saying.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This comment exemplifies the 'Women's Safety as Her Own Responsibility' frame by advising women against being out late and alone ('Agar raat ko 12-1 baje akeli nikalogi'), framing it as practical advice ('practicality bhi dekho na'), and shifting the onus of safety onto women themselves ('apna khayal khud rakhna hi padega'). It implicitly accepts male predatory behavior as unchangeable ('We can't change everyone overnight'), disguised as concern ('Bas careful raho').
original_frame: Prenup, Alimony as Reverse Dowry, Women
persona_text: You are Deepak. Age 36. Single. A divorced man living in Delhi. You are commenting under your real name on a Facebook post about a celebrity couple's divorce where the wife is seeking 50 percent of her husband's assets despite having worked for only two years of their eight year marriage. You are commenting on whether what she is asking for is justified and what it says about why women get married.
